input.request_text: Replicate the research paper 'All In One': The paper "All-in-one simulation-based inference" has been reproduced. This involves 5 major phases and 233 total subtasks. The workflow includes: Variance Exploding SDE (VESDE) is implemented, as described in A2.1; The Simformer model, training process and inference process has been implemented; Baseline methods Neural Posterior Estimation (NPE), Neural Ratio Estimation (NRE), and Neural Likelihood Estimation (NLE) are implemented.
